alt: Walrus using its tusks while hauling its body onto land
caption: A walrus can hook its tusks into the ice to drag itself out of the water, like tooth-walking.
attributionText: Photo by Joel Garlich-Miller, U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service via Wikimedia Commons, Public domain
